summary: First iteration testing of NOXN landing page + Assessment API. Both backend and frontend pass all critical flows. 9/9 backend pytest cases pass (smoke, legacy /status, full assessment CRUD-list, all 422 validation paths). Frontend e2e via Playwright: landing renders all sections with correct testids, 6 CTAs (header/hero/3x pricing/footer) all open the assessment modal, FAQ accordion works, multi-step form validates per step (Continue stays on same step + inline error when required field missing), and the happy path POSTs to /api/assessments and returns 201 with a UUID id, success state and toast confirmation appear.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: POST /api/assessments has a redundant manual `if not payload.services` check — Pydantic List[str] with empty array would still pass, so the explicit check is correct to enforce min length. Consider using `conlist(str, min_length=1)` instead for cleaner pydantic-native validation and OpenAPI docs.
server.py: CORS uses `os.environ.get('CORS_ORIGINS', '*').split(',')` which becomes `['*']` if unset — fine for MVP but should be explicit in .env for production.

server.py: `datetime` is stored as ISO string in Mongo (`doc['created_at'] = doc['created_at'].isoformat()`). Sorting works because ISO 8601 lex-orders correctly, but a native BSON Date would be cleaner.

AssessmentForm.jsx: testIds for budget options use `b.replace(/[^a-z0-9]/gi, '-')` which produces collapsed slugs like `form-field-budget--5k----15k` (multiple dashes) — works but brittle for tests. Consider a stable slug map.
AssessmentForm.jsx: Single 506-line file mixing schema, step components, OptionButton, FormInput, SuccessState — within 700 line guideline but could be split into smaller files for maintainability.
test_credentials: N/A — no auth in this MVP
seed_data_creation: Created test assessments + status checks prefixed with TEST_ via pytest; no cleanup performed (acceptable for MVP, all writes use TEST_ prefix for identification).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend regression suite is at /app/backend/tests/test_assessments.py (run: pytest /app/backend/tests/ -v). Frontend testids are canonical via /app/frontend/src/constants/testIds/noxn.js. NOTE: budget option testids are slugged via a non-trivial regex; prefer clicking by visible text (e.g. await page.get_by_text('$5k – $15k', exact=True).click()) rather than guessing the slug. Happy-path POST writes to MongoDB collection `assessments` with a UUID `id` and ISO `created_at`.
